Campaigns

Protecting Our Countryside

24/7 Emergency Care Services Staying at PRH

The PRH will retain 24 hour, 7 day a week emergency care services. About 80% of the A&E services currently provided at the PRH will still be provided there...

More Funding For Local Schools

The last Conservative Government confirmed that schools will receive £2 billion of additional funding during both the 2023-24 and 2024-25 academic years. That...

Championing Defence Jobs for The Wrekin

Conservatives are strong on defence. The last Conservative Government proved this locally by its ongoing investment into local defence jobs and multiple...

Improving animal welfare

Ever since he was first elected in 2005, animal welfare has been high on Mark's agenda. Mark has introduced several animal welfare Bills and motions aimed at...
